subcodes.first_line: O thou who art steadfast in the Covenant! Thy letter was eloquent indeed, and its composition was sweet in its expression, bringing joy upon its reading [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ثابت بر پیمان نامه شما نامی بود و تحریر تقریر شیرین داشت از قرائتش مسرت
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for the departed, @martyrs and martyrdom, @acknowledgment of gift; of monetary contribution, @business; financial; property matters, @power; greatness; centrality of the Covenant, @interpretation of dreams and visions
